creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
kwm         2010-06-11 20:51:24 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    security/nss/files   patch-..::coreconf::FreeBSD.mk 
  Added files:
    security/nss/files   patch-lib_freebl_mpi_mpcpucache.c 
  Log:
  Fix the build on powerpc64. By adding CPU_ARCH detection.
  And by adding some G5-specific code in mpcpucache.c to detect cacheline sizes.
  
  PR:             ports/147696
  Submitted by:   nwhitehorn@
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.16      +5 -1      ports/security/nss/files/patch-..::coreconf::FreeBSD.mk
